[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011111 5
1 01001110 4
2 10010101 4
3 11011110 6
4 11101011 6
5 10100011 4
6 10110110 5
7 01111111 7

70 10110101 5
